zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Clifford於大約1310年出生在英國肯特藍爾爾斯特時，她的父親Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford37歲，母親Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles35歲。她於1333年與Thomas Waller II在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1338年在英國英格蘭肯特藍爾爾斯特享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Clifford于大约1310年出生在英国肯特藍爾爾斯特时，她的父亲Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford37岁，母亲Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles35岁。她于1333年与Thomas Waller II在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1338年在英国英格兰肯特藍爾爾斯特享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Clifford was born about 1310, in Lamberhurst, Kent, England, her father, Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford, was 37 and her mother, Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles, was 35. She married Thomas Waller II in 1333, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1338, in Lamberhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Clifford est née environ 1310, à Lamberhurst, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Waller II en 1333, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1338, à Lamberhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Clifford um 1310 in Lamberhurst, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford 37 und ihre Mutter Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles 35. Sie hat 1333 in England Thomas Waller II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1338 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Lamberhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Clifford è nata il circa 1310 nel Lamberhurst, Kent, England, sua padre, Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Waller II nel 1333, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1338, nel Lamberhurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Clifford(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 켄트 램후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1333년 영국에서 Thomas Waller II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 램후르스트에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Waller II em 1333, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1338, em Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Clifford родилась около 1310 г. в местности лэмбирурст, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Waller II в 1333 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1338 г. в местности лэмбирурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Clifford nació aproximadamente 1310, en Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Clifford 1st Baron de Clifford, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Maud de Clare Baroness de Welles, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Thomas Waller II en 1333, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1338, en Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
